title: Whimscape X Mods
body:
Fresh Mods Textures With Whimscape Style

Supported mods:
- [Libz](https://modrinth.com/mod/libz)
- [Metal Bundles](https://modrinth.com/mod/metal-bundles)
- [Mythic Charms](https://modrinth.com/mod/mythic-charms) (Trinkets only)
- [Tierify](https://modrinth.com/mod/tierify)
- [Alloy Forgery](https://modrinth.com/mod/alloy-forgery)
- [Spelunkery](https://modrinth.com/mod/spelunkery) (Only vanilla ores)
- [Strange Berries](https://modrinth.com/mod/strange-berries/gallery)
- [Mythic Metals](https://modrinth.com/mod/mythicmetals) (Ores only)
  
Credits:
- [Whimscape](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/whimscape)
